get.description: The greenhouse controller's current simulated-clock speed and tick, relayed from the controller's `GET /sim/time-scale` (controller HAL §7). Simulation-only diagnostic: a real-hardware controller has no time-scale and the platform returns 404. Each controller's clock is independent.

patch.description: Sets this greenhouse controller's simulated-clock speed, relayed to the controller's `PUT /sim/time-scale` and latched to the controller's next tick (frontend interactions: edit → optimistic pending → settled/rolled back). A simulation-only diagnostic, NOT a setpoint — an explicit, narrow exception to the platform's setpoint-only downward control (platform constraints §7). Out-of-range values are rejected with 422; a real-hardware controller returns 404.

200.description: The time-scale state after applying the change.
